features.description: Enhanced list output shows compressed size column

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --lib list::tests 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: List output formatting is purely display logic verified by unit tests

alternative_verification.command: cargo test --lib list::tests 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

features.description: JSON/Object column detection in backup pre-flight

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: check_json_columns method not found in ChClient

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: check_json_columns not called from backup pre-flight

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: JSON column check requires real ClickHouse with JSON columns. Warning-only behavior verified by structural + behavioral checks.

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn list_all_tables' src/clickhouse/client.rs && grep -c 'pub fn matches_including_system' src/table_filter.rs && grep -c 'pub(crate) fn format_size' src/list.rs | tail -1
layers.fail_message: list_all_tables, matches_including_system, or pub(crate) format_size not found

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: Tables command still shows stub or not implemented

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Tables command requires live ClickHouse connection for meaningful runtime test. Structural and behavioral checks verify stub is replaced with full implementation.

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: archive_extension helper not found in upload/stream.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after compression format changes

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --lib upload::stream::tests download::stream::tests 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Compression formats are pure sync functions tested exhaustively via unit test roundtrips for all 4 formats. No external service needed.

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules

layers.name: structural
layers.command: for m in src/upload src/download src/clickhouse src/backup; do [ -f "$m/CLAUDE.md" ] || echo "MISSING: $m"; done && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: for m in src/upload src/download src/clickhouse src/backup; do grep -q 'Parent Context' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Directory Structure' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Key Patterns' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Parent Rules' "$m/CLAUDE.md" || exit 1; done && echo VALID
